first_run.rationale: The core reasoning and score are identical in both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the candidate as a strong senior individual contributor who lacks the requisite executive and management experience for a CTO role. The minor variations in wording for strengths and concerns are well within the bounds of typical run-to-run noise and do not reflect a substantive change in assessment based on the location change from Berlin to San Francisco.
